# Context

## Product

Lerret is a local-first design canvas for developers — author assets as React
components, arrange them on an infinite canvas, export pixel-perfect images. No
cloud, no lock-in; everything is files you git-track.

## Audience

Indie developers and small product teams who already write React and want their
marketing visuals to live in the same repo as their code.

## Tone

Builder-to-builder. We assume the reader can read a diff. Show, don't sell.
